references.text: Schori, M & TMA Utteridge. 2010. Three new species and a new name in Southeast Asian Gomphandra (Stemonuraceae / Icacinaceae s.l.). Blumea 55: 189-195
Schori, M & TMA Utteridge. 2012. Six new species and a new subspecies of Gomphandra (Stemonuraceae) from the Philippines. Kew Bulletin 67: 713-729.
Schori, M. 2010. A systematic revision of Gomphandra (Stemonuraceae). Ph.D. Dissertation, Ohio University, Athens OH, USA
Sleumer, H. 1971. Icacinaceae. Flora Malesiana series 1, 7: 1-87

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 3 June 2018

species.citation: (Merr.) R.A.Howard , Brittonia 5 (1943) 56 ; Sleumer, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1971) 43; ≡ Stemonurus merrittii Merr. , PJS 3c (1908) 240 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 489.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. BALABAC, MINDORO, PALAWAN, PANAY.
species.notes: Primary forests, under partial shade, on clayey soil or fertile humus. 0-200m.

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 19 February 2025

species.citation: Schori , Kew Bull. 67 (2012) 713.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. PALAWAN.

species.citation: Schori , Kew Bull. 67 (2012) 720.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. LUZON: Aurora (photos), Isabela.
species.notes: Over limestone; lowland dipterocarp forest; streamside forest on ultramafic soil. 30–50m.

species.citation: Schori , Blumea 55 (2010) 192.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. LUZON: Benguet (photos), Ifugao.

species.citation: (Miers) Fern.-Vill. , Fl. Filip., 3rd Ed. 4(Nov. App.) (1880) 46 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 490; Sleumer, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1971) 27; ≡ Stemonurus cumingianus Miers , Ann. Mag. Nat. Hist., 2nd Ser. 10 (1852) 42. = Gomphandra agusanensis (Elmer) Merr. , EPFP 2 (1923) 489; ≡ Stemonurus agusanensis Elmer , LPB 7 (1915) 2689.
species.distribution: Borneo, Philippines. ALABAT, BASILAN, BILIRAN, JOLO, LEYTE, LUZON: Camarines, Camarines Sur, Laguna, Nueva Ecija, Quezon, Sorsogon, MINDANAO: Agusan del Norte, Lanao del Sur, Misamis Occidental, Surigao, Surigao del Norte, Zamboanga del Norte (photos), Zamboanga del Sur, MINDORO, PALAWAN, PARASAN, POLILLO, SAMAR, SIARGAO (photos).
species.notes: Primary mixed dipterocarp forests at low and medium elevation. 50-930m.

species.citation: Schori , Kew Bull. 67 (2012) 724.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. DINAGAT, MINDANAO.

species.citation: Schori & Utteridge , Kew Bull. 67 (2012) 715 ; Romeroso et al., J. Asia-Pacific biodiv. 17 (2024) 13.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. BILIRAN, DINAGAT, HOMONHON, LEYTE, MANICANI, MINDANAO, SAMAR.

species.citation: (Elmer) Merr. , EPFP 2 (1923) 490 ; Sleumer, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1971) 30; ≡ Stemonurus flavicarpus Elmer , LPB 7 (1915) 2691.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. MINDANAO: Bukidnon, Davao, Davao del Sur, Lanao, Lanao del Sur, Misamis Oriental (photos), Surigao del Sur (photos), Zamboanga del Norte (photos).

species.citation: (Elmer) Merr. , EPFP 2 (1923) 490 ; Sleumer, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1971) 24; ≡ Urandra fuliginea Elmer , LPB 2 (1908) 491.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. LUZON: Benguet.

species.citation: Schori , Blumea 55 (2010) 191.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. MINDORO.
species.notes: Primary forest and cloud forest, Mt Halcon, on gravel/sand. 1200-1350m.

species.citation: Merr. , PJS 17 (1920) 277 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 490; Sleumer, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1971) 31.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. LUZON: Aurora.
species.notes: Low elevation primary forest. Known only from the type. 200m.

species.citation: (Merr.) Merr. , EPFP 2 (1923) 490; ≡ Urandra luzoniensis Merr. , PJS 3c (1908) 242. ssp. luzoniensis Merr., EPFP 2 (1923) 490; Sleumer, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1971) 31. Distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. LUZON: Bataan, Batangas, Cagayan, Cavite, Ilocos Norte, Ilocos Sur, La Union, Laguna, Nueva Ecija, Rizal, MARINDUQUE, MINDORO, PALAWAN, PANAY (photos). Notes: Common in primary forests under partial shade or along forest edges. 0-850m. Native. ssp. septentrionalis Schori & Utteridge, Kew Bull. 67 (2012) 717. Distribution: Philippines, Taiwan. BATAN, BATANES, ITBAYAT (photos). Notes: 0-425m. Native.
species.distribution: Philippines, Taiwan. BATAN, BATANES, CALAYAN, ITBAYAT (photos), LUZON: Apayao (photos), Bataan, Batangas, Bulacan, Cagayan, Cavite, Ilocos Norte, Ilocos Sur, La Union, Laguna, Nueva Ecija, Quezon (photos), Rizal, MARINDUQUE, MINDORO, PALAWAN, PANAY (photos), SAMAR.

species.citation: Valeton , Crit. Overz. Olacin. (1886) 227; ≡ Gomphandra apoensis (Elmer) Merr. , EPFP 2 (1923) 490 ; Sleumer, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1971) 29; ≡ Stemonurus apoensis Elmer , LPB 7 (1915) 2690.
species.distribution: Lesser Sunda Isls, Moluccas, Philippines, Sulawesi. ALABAT, BOHOL, CAMIGUIN (photos), CEBU (photos), LEYTE, LUZON: Camarines Sur, Quezon, Sorsogon, MINDANAO: Bukidnon, Davao, Davao del Sur, NEGROS, PALAUI, POLILLO, SAMAR, SIARGAO.
species.notes: Primary forests along streams. Found on limestone. 90-976m.

species.citation: Merr. , PJS 17 (1920) 277 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 491; Sleumer, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1971) 31.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. CATANDUANES, DINAGAT, LUZON: Camarines, Camarines Norte, Sorsogon, MINDANAO: Davao, MINDORO.

species.citation: Sleumer , Notizbl. Bot. Gart. Berlin-Dahlem 15 (1940) 238 ; Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1971) 30. = Gomphandra pauciflora (Merr.) Merr. , EPFP 2 (1923) 491, nom. illeg., non Craib; ≡ Urandra pauciflora Merr. , PJS 3c (1908) 243.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. DINAGAT, MINDORO, PANAY, SAMAR, SIBUYAN.
species.notes: Low elevation primary forests. Common in Mt Guiting-Guiting NP. Fruit yellow. 50-1300m.

species.citation: Schori , Kew Bull. 67 (2012) 721.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. LUZON: Laguna, Quezon.

species.citation: Schori , Kew Bull. 67 (2012) 725.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. MINDANAO: Davao Oriental.
species.notes: Part of Gomphandra luzoniensis complex, leaves small and thick, male stamens 9 mm long, fruit slightly orange-beige. Fl. & fr. May. Melanie Schori (19-Oct-25): only known from Mt Hamiguitan. 200-1000m.

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 8 October 2017

species.citation: (Miers) R.A.Howard , J. Arnold Arbor. 21 (1940) 470 ; Sleumer, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1971) 46; ≡ Gomphandra laxiflora (Miers) Rolfe , J. Bot. 23 (1885) 211 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 490; ≡ Stemonurus laxiflorus Miers , Ann. Mag. Nat. Hist., 2nd Ser. 10 (1852) 111. = Medusanthera glabra (Merr.) R.A.Howard , J. Arnold Arbor. 21 (1940) 469; ≡ Gomphandra glabra Merr. , PJS 17 (1920) 277 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 490.
species.distribution: Moluccas, New Guinea, Pacific Ocean, Philippines, Solomon Isls, Sulawesi. LEYTE, LUZON: Albay, MINDANAO, MINDORO, PALAWAN, SAMAR, SIARGAO (photos).

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 3 June 2018

species.citation: (Elmer) Sleumer , Blumea 17 (1969) 261 ; Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1971) 61; ≡ Urandra gitingensis Elmer , LPB 4 (1912) 1476. ≠ Stemonurus secundiflorus auct. non Blume ; Merr., EPFP 2 (1923) 489.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. BASILAN, PANAY, SIBUYAN.

species.citation: Becc. , Malesia 1 (1877) 115 ; Sleumer, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1971) 62. = Stemonurus hallieri (Merr.) Merr. , EPFP 2 (1923) 489; ≡ Urandra hallieri Merr. , PJS 5c (1910) 194.
species.distribution: Borneo, Malay Peninsula, Philippines. BASILAN, DINAGAT, MINDANAO: Agusan del Norte, Surigao, Surigao del Sur, Zamboanga, Zamboanga del Sur.
species.notes: Low elevation primary forests in Mindanao. 0-900(-1800)m.
